assessment.note: He names a concrete next-level aspiration — owning a cross-org decision area — which signals strong growth direction and some continued ambition.

new_queue.label: Cross-org decisions
new_queue.name: Cross-org decision area — which decisions do you want your name attached to?
new_queue.description: Turns his stated aspiration into a concrete picture of the scope and outcomes he wants to own.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship shape
new_queue.name: What kind of sponsorship would actually move the needle for you here?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific air cover, introductions, or backing he needs instead of generic support.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to do before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth conversation into an action plan.
